title: T-046 — SET-006 Onboarding Completion (confetti + next-step cards, S-U1)
prompt:
# T-046 — SET-006 Onboarding Completion (confetti + next-step cards, S-U1)

## Goal
SET-006 onboarding completion step production component (onboarding-flow parity).

Canonical Settings prototype source of truth is `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/*.jsx`. For onboarding, DO NOT use org-screens/data-screens as 1:1 source. Use `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/onboarding-screens.jsx:7-238` as the canonical onboarding flow prototype and implement only current step `completion` / SET-006 completion celebration and next-step cards. Reuse shared Settings shell/design tokens where applicable, but onboarding parity must preserve the wizard stepper, saved-state/resume semantics, skippable redirect cards, and completion pattern from `onboarding-screens.jsx`. Production contract: data via Server Components (Drizzle); mutations via Server Actions; primitives from `packages/ui` only.

## Files in scope
- apps/web/app/onboarding/complete/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/onboarding/complete/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Given the production onboarding step renders, when compared to `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/onboarding-screens.jsx:7-238` for current step `completion` / SET-006 completion celebration and next-step cards, then it follows the onboarding wizard structure and interactions: stepper, labels, state transitions, skip/back/continue behavior, loading/error states and focus order. Org/data screens may be reused only for individual field styling, not as the 1:1 onboarding source.
- Given Finish is clicked, when action commits, then onboarding_completed_at = now() and middleware no longer redirects /admin to /onboarding.
- Given the page renders, when checked, then the 3 cards link to exactly /admin/features, /admin/schema, /admin/rules (matches §14.4 amended).

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: write RTL test that mounts the page with mocked data and asserts the parity AC items + ac_extra coverage.
- GREEN: build component, wire Server Action(s).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/onboarding/completion/page.test.tsx [create]` and `pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui (§0 ESLint rule).
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale — translate to production contract.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe violations = fail).
- Do not treat org-screens.jsx or data-screens.jsx as canonical 1:1 onboarding screens; onboarding-screens.jsx owns the flow.
